title: Support  - App
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app Support > App section displays App Version, Tenant Name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, and Last Connected info with a Go button for support troubleshooting
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Tap on the menu icon (hamburger menu) or navigate to the Support section.
Tap on the 'App' section within Support.
expected: The Support > App section displays the following details: App Version, Tenant Name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, and Last Connected info. A "Go" button is visible to proceed with sending this information to support.
